title: Filter Fields Showing Blank Results in Dictionary
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the filter fields feature to correctly display matching fields when I apply a filter, so that I can narrow down the field list as expected.
description:
When selecting the filter to show only filter-applicable fields in the Data Dictionary, the table appears blank even though the underlying data confirms filter fields exist. This is a bug where the filter function became disconnected from the data source.

The fix restores the correct filtering behavior so that the table properly displays fields matching the selected filter criteria.
acceptance_criteria: Selecting a filter correctly displays matching fields in the table
Fields that match the filter criteria are visible (not blank)
Filter works consistently across all object detail pages
Clearing the filter restores the full field list
ux_changes: Fixes the filter fields display — filtered results now correctly show matching fields instead of a blank table.
middleware_changes: Fixes the data query or filtering logic that was returning empty results despite matching data existing.
implementation_notes: Developer needed a meeting to understand the exact filter behavior before fixing. The fix was deployed to the development environment.
comment_summary: Developer requested a meeting to discuss the issue. After discussion, the fix was implemented and deployed to development.
